creator: loic.blot@unix-experience.fr
text:
At each owncloud update, like a pkg update due to dependancy or a real owncloud version update permissions on folder /usr/local/www/owncloud/data are set to root:wheel instead of www:www. Then owncloud cannot work

	Same problem is present on apps and config folder.

How-To-Repeat: 	reinstall owncloud or change apache deps on a pkgng repo and update a system with owncloud installed
